file_insights.documentation_style: Comprehensive JSDoc with examples for all interfaces

file_insights.key_characteristics: Truncated in diff but serves as single export point

patterns_discovered.description: All API responses wrapped in ApiResponse<T> or PaginatedResponse<T> with success boolean
patterns_discovered.benefit: Consistent error handling and type safety across API

patterns_discovered.description: ApiResult<T> = ApiResponse<T> | ApiErrorResponse for handling both outcomes
patterns_discovered.benefit: Forces handling of both success and error cases in consuming code
Safe type narrowing without casting, improved DX

patterns_discovered.description: ApiError with code, message, details, requestId, timestamp fields
patterns_discovered.benefit: Machine-readable error codes for i18n and programmatic handling

patterns_discovered.description: Separate interfaces for PaginationQuery, SortQuery, FilterQuery, composable into ListQuery
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexible query parameter combinations with type safety

patterns_discovered.description: Offset-based PaginationMeta and CursorPaginationMeta both supported
patterns_discovered.benefit: Flexibility for different use cases and dataset sizes

patterns_discovered.description: BatchResponse<T> with per-item results and summary statistics
patterns_discovered.benefit: Structured handling of bulk operations with partial success scenarios
Reduced boilerplate when working with wrapped types

gotchas_discovered.description: FilterQuery defined as Record<string, unknown> without specific structure definition
gotchas_discovered.impact: Loss of type safety for filter parameters - consumers need documentation or runtime validation
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Could be strengthened with union of specific filter field types

gotchas_discovered.description: ValidationErrorDetail.params is Record<string, unknown> without schema
gotchas_discovered.impact: Consuming code may struggle to type validation error parameters correctly
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider defining specific param shapes for common validators

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: No explicit success: false type narrowing
gotchas_discovered.description: ApiErrorResponse only has success: false but no explicit true type in error union
gotchas_discovered.impact: Minor - type guards handle this well, but could be more explicit
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Current implementation with type guards is sufficient

gotchas_discovered.description: cursor field is string | null, which becomes falsy when null
gotchas_discovered.impact: Conditional logic for hasMore vs cursor availability needs explicit null check

deliverables_completed: Created comprehensive api.types.ts with 564 lines of well-documented types
Defined success response types: ApiResponse, PaginatedResponse
Defined error response types: ApiErrorResponse, ApiError, ValidationErrorDetail
Implemented query parameter types: PaginationQuery, SortQuery, FilterQuery, ListQuery
Created utility types: ExtractApiData, ExtractPaginatedItem, AsyncApiResponse
Implemented cursor-based pagination types as alternative
Created batch operation types: BatchResponse, BatchItemResult
Implemented type guards: isApiSuccess, isApiError, isPaginatedResponse
All types include JSDoc documentation with examples

quality_metrics.documentation_coverage: 100% - Every interface and function has JSDoc
quality_metrics.example_coverage: Comprehensive - Nearly all types include usage examples
quality_metrics.type_safety: High - Proper generics, union types, and type guards

recommendations.recommendation: Add specific typed interfaces for common filter operations
recommendations.rationale: FilterQuery is too generic (Record<string, unknown>); defining specific field types would improve DX

recommendations.recommendation: Add validation rule enum or constants for common rules
recommendations.rationale: ValidationErrorDetail.rule is string; defining constants prevents typos in error handling

recommendations.recommendation: Reference API_CONTRACTS.md in README or type file comments
recommendations.rationale: Documentation mentions API_CONTRACTS.md but file not visible in diff

recommendations.recommendation: Create unit tests for type guards (isApiSuccess, isApiError, isPaginatedResponse)
recommendations.rationale: Type guards are critical for runtime safety; tests ensure they work as expected

recommendations.recommendation: Consider using discriminated union for ApiResult to improve type narrowing
recommendations.rationale: Current union works but discriminated unions could provide better IDE support

recommendations.recommendation: Add factory functions for common response patterns
recommendations.rationale: createSuccessResponse<T>(), createErrorResponse() would reduce boilerplate in controllers

recommendations.recommendation: Verify all existing API endpoints conform to these types
recommendations.rationale: New types define contract; need to audit existing code for compliance
